---
applyTo: "src/**/*.{js,ts,vue,css},docs/**/*.md"
---

# Frontend Code Review Guidance

Use this guidance when reviewing frontend changes in this project.

- Check correctness, readability, maintainability, and user experience.
- Confirm the change is scoped to the right file and follows the existing project structure.
- Review for responsive layout, accessibility, and consistent visual styling.
- Make sure pages and routes are wired correctly when new views are added.
- Look for duplicated logic, unclear naming, and unnecessary complexity.
- Verify the result with npm run build before considering the work complete.
